name: ropegeo-web
description: RopeGeo landing (ropegeo.com) and mobile deep-link / explore HTML (mobile.ropegeo.com)

scripts.merge:api-template: npx ts-node --files scripts/mergeTemplate.ts cloudformation/stacks/api cloudformation/stacks/mergedApiTemplate.yaml "RopeGeo-Web HTTP API and CloudFront (OpenAPI from docs bucket)"
scripts.build:openapi: mkdir -p docs-build && cp openapi-docs/index.html docs-build/index.html && npx @redocly/cli bundle openapi-docs/index.yaml -o docs-build/openapi.yaml --dereferenced && npx @redocly/cli bundle openapi-docs/index.yaml -o docs-build/openapi.json --dereferenced
scripts.lint:openapi: npx @redocly/cli bundle openapi-docs/index.yaml -o docs-build/openapi-bundled.yaml --dereferenced && spectral lint --verbose -r openapi-docs/.spectral.yaml docs-build/openapi-bundled.yaml
scripts.build:landing: node scripts/ensureLandingAssets.cjs && npx expo export --platform web && node scripts/injectLinkPreviewPlaceholder.cjs
